name: show_agent_network
description: Open the JourneyOS Agent Network so the traveler can inspect delegation and handoff traces.

name: show_booking_options
description: Open JourneyOS Booking and Checkout so the traveler can review flights, hotels, and payment details.

name: trip_brief_ready
description: Save the complete admin brief. Send conversation, origin, destination, departureDate, returnDate, travelers, budget, interests, foodPreferences, and travelStyle.

name: collect_maya_preferences
description: End the browser conversation and start the configured simulated-traveler preference call.

name: itinerary_command
description: Change only the active Live Trip day. Send the traveler’s exact start, complete, restore, skip, cancel, or delay request in query.

name: replan_trip
description: Replan the active day for late, rain, flight-delay, closed, or tired. Send the value in type.

name: confirm_change
description: Confirm and apply the proposed active-day flight-delay recovery after the traveler explicitly agrees.

name: navigate
description: Open a JourneyOS page. Send page as home, planner, checkout, live, expenses, or dna.

name: show_day
description: Open a numbered itinerary day on Live Trip. Send the integer in day.

name: trip_plan_created
description: Notify the voice agent that JourneyOS structured and saved the trip brief.

name: journeyos_context
description: Supplies current page, confirmed trip, selected booking, friends, and active itinerary day. Treat it as authoritative and do not restart planning.
